ruleInventory.reason: Promotion candidate; can be A/B tested against AI ranking.
Availability guardrail; do not show unavailable products early.

milestones.title: Audit catalog, inventory and user event feeds
Build shared search and recommendation runtime from one snapshot
Use search, click, add-to-cart and purchase events in ranking
Complete staging end-to-end search and recommendation functional test
